overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a neon-lit gun shop called 'LOTS OF GUNS'. The player approaches the counter, passes a vendor NPC, and examines weapons on illuminated display walls in a gritty, industrial interior setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to gun shop entrance

events.description: player walks through the entrance into the gun shop interior

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow corridor toward the gun shop entrance, approaching the security bars

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'LOTS' in bright white neon letters above 'OF GUNS' in smaller text
vertical neon sign with 'OPEN' in blue and green letters hanging above the entrance
vertical metal security bars covering the shop entrance and counter area
large illuminated octagonal neon light fixture on the back wall of the shop
dark industrial wall with vertical ribbing and a vending machine

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow industrial corridor toward the entrance of a gun shop. Bright neon signage reading 'LOTS OF GUNS' dominates the view ahead, with a vertical 'OPEN' sign glowing above the metal security bars that cage the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gun shop interior with security counter and caged vendor area

events.description: player slows down while approaching the counter where the vendor is located
player turns right and moves away from the counter toward the weapon display area

agents.ego_description: moving around the counter area inside the gun shop, observing the vendor and interior layout

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a yellow jacket standing behind the security bars, initially leaning on the counter then standing upright

entered.detail: metal counter with horizontal surface running along the security bars
metal door with push bar at the back of the shop behind the counter
small red illuminated exit sign above the back door

segments.scene_description: Inside the gun shop, the player approaches a caged counter where a vendor in a yellow jacket stands behind metal security bars. The player moves past the counter area, revealing a back room door and red exit sign, while the neon octagon fixture remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon display area with illuminated hexagonal wall racks

events.description: camera zooms in closely on a specific assault rifle mounted on the display wall

agents.ego_description: examining the weapon displays on the wall, moving close to inspect a specific rifle in detail

entered.detail: wall with multiple firearms mounted on illuminated hexagonal tile backing
glowing hexagonal tile pattern behind the weapon racks
various rifles and submachine guns arranged in rows on the wall
large white text 'GUNS' painted on the dark floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves to the weapon display area where various firearms are mounted on an illuminated hexagonal tile wall. The camera pans across the racks and zooms in for a close inspection of a specific assault rifle, with the neon octagon fixture now visible in the left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim industrial corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit interior of a specialized weapon shop. It begins by advancing through a narrow passage toward the glowing signage of LOTS OF GUNS and a vertical OPEN sign marking the caged entrance. As the camera enters the shop, the view shifts past a vendor in a yellow jacket standing behind security bars, revealing a back room door and a red exit sign. The scene then expands into the weapon display area, where the camera pans across firearms mounted on an illuminated hexagonal tile wall. Finally, the movement culminates in a close inspection of a specific assault rifle while a neon octagon fixture glows in the background.
